settings.heading:
Quality
It’s what makes us better.
settings.text: As a bunch of passionate perfectionists, settling just isn't in our DNA. It's why we obsess over materials like 100% natural pozzolan pumice. Why we collaborate with the building and architectural communities to create products that don't just meet their design requirements, but that are easy to install too. We take pride in our work and back it up with an industry-leading 50 year warranty.

settings.heading: A Rock-Solid Crew
settings.text:
At Creative Mines, we are a group of passionate stone enthusiasts on a mission to elevate the art and science of masonry design.

Our masonry stone, brick, and architectural elements are crafted with unwavering attention to detail, blending artisan beauty with cutting-edge innovation.

With stunning aesthetics and advanced concrete technology our products are engineered to outperform and outlast any other manufactured stone veneer on the market.

With bold ideas, proprietary advancements, and a commitment to superior customer experience, we deliver products that redefine what’s possible.

settings.heading: What Sets Us Apart
settings.text:
Creative Mines is the only masonry veneer company incorporating Pozzolan into its concrete mix design, delivering unmatched performance and longevity.

The advanced material, famously used in architectural icons like the Roman Colosseum, creates a tighter concrete matrix that eliminates common issues found within inferior manufactured stone, such as color fading, efflorescence, and stone degradation.

Creative Mines is engineered to withstand the elements and deliver enduring beauty and timeless appeal for all your project needs.

Why settle for anything less than legendary.

settings.heading:
Responsibility
It’s what makes us better.
settings.description: Masonry veneer should not only be suitable for deserving architectural styles, but respectful of the environment. We get that. That's why our products are designed with sustainability in mind and can contribute to earning LEED-certified points in several key categories. Our products are completely recyclable, reduce waste, reduce carbon footprint compared to clay brick and contribute to the reduction of natural stone excavation around the world.
